Personal IMDb Top 250 TV Re-ranker

Generated from official IMDb non-commercial datasets. Snapshot: 2026-06-02T14:17:36.441122+00:00. Scores sort by full precision and display to two decimals.

Rating Source

Episode mode uses each regular episode equally.

Vote Source
Episode Extras
Extra detection is automatic and may be inaccurate. Episodes with missing, zero, or non-positive season/episode numbers are treated as possible extras.
Minimum Episodes
0

Shows with fewer than 0 episodes are removed from the active ranking.

Episode Shape
0

When enabled, a show remains if its running average reaches this value at least once.

5

When enabled, a show remains if its centered span average reaches this value at least once.

Flags shows with unusually flat episode ratings or unusually straight running-average paths. This is a heuristic.

Certainty
99.5%

Trust threshold: 4,975,000 votes reaches 100% certainty. Uncapped mode uses the IMDb-style curve and never reaches a true 100%.
